HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TRUCONNECT COMMUNICATIONS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant TruConnect Communications, Inc.'s demurrer to Plaintiff Pacific Bell Telephone Company, d/b/a AT&T California's complaint is overruled.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.
